title: MISO LMP Real Time 5 Min Ex Ante CSV download
description:
Ex-Ante, real-time, five-minute, LMPs in MISO. These are the LMPs calculated via the *SCED* program on a 5-minute basis in MISO, which produces the economic dispatch. Ex-Ante LMPs in real-time are for informational purposes only. 

Ex-Post LMPs may differ from Ex-Ante LMPs depending on fast start and emergency operations resources.

See MISO's *BPM 002 - Energy and Operating Reserves* for additional discussion.
